title: epipactis × lachmanii
intro: Epipactis × lachmanii, also known as the Lachmann's Helleborine hybrid, is a rare and unique orchid species that is a natural hybrid of Epipactis helleborine and Epipactis leptochila. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help alleviate respiratory issues and soothe irritated skin. The health benefits of Epipactis × lachmanii include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote overall well-being. Epipactis × lachmanii can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions and support immune function.
